Motion On First And Final Account Of Referee And Petition For Allowance Of Referee'S Fees And Reimbursement Og Referee'S Costs.
Off Calendar Jul-22-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Martin Eisenberg, Esq., 650/685-1550, petitioner (Court appointed referee) moving for first and Final Account Of Referee And Petition For Allowance Of Referee'S Fees And Reimbursement Of Referee's Costs

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court, upon examining the proof of service attached to the notice of motion on file, ordered the petitioner to contact the respondent by telephone and report back to the Court before the end of today. The Court then took MARTIN M. EISENBERG, ESQ.(COURT APPOINTED REFEREE)'s Motion On First And Final Account Of Referee And Petition For Allowance Of Referee'S Fees And Reimbursement Of Referee's Costs under submission. (DEW/301/JU) Reporter: Candace Yount, #2737

Notice Of Hearing Upon Referee'S Report Of Sale And Petition For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-18-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Martin Eisenberg, Esq., 650/685-1550, Court appointed referee, moving for
hearing Upon Referee's Report Of Sale And Petition For Confirmation Of Sale Of Real
Property

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. The Court, having heard the referee's
argument, granted PETITIONER MARTIN M. EISENBERG, ESQ.(COURT APPOINTED REFEREE)'s
Hearing Upon Referee's Report Of Sale And approved the Petition For Confirmation Of
Sale Of Real Property. Petitioner is to prepare an order for the Court. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
